---
title: "On Graphs: Finals Week"
description: |
  This finals week was definitely the most gruelling of my college life.
author:
  - name: TJ Palanca
    url: https://www.twitter.com/tjpalanca
date: 04-20-2012
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
categories: ["humor", "dataviz", "school"]
preview: images/20120420-graphs-finals-week-thumb.jpg
---

This finals week was definitely the most gruelling of my college life. Here are a few visualizations that sum up my sentiments:

```{r out.width="100%", fig.cap="Cups of Coffee Consumed"}
knitr::include_graphics("images/20120420-graphs-finals-week-thumb.jpg")
```

```{r out.width="100%", fig.cap="Hours of Sleep Enjoyed"}
knitr::include_graphics("images/20120420-graphs-finals-week-sleep.jpg")
```
